summary: Comprehensive testing of Price Hide/Show Toggle feature (Quotation Model). All 10 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified all quotation mode features including product cards, product detail page, cart (Inquiry List), and checkout (Request Quotation). Login text next to login icon also verified.

issues: Console warning: 'You should call navigate() in a React.useEffect()' - code quality improvement recommended

backend: Products API works regardless of show_prices setting
Single product API works regardless of show_prices setting
Toggle state consistency between ERP and public settings
frontend: Login text visible next to login icon when not logged in
Show Prices on Website toggle present in Storefront tab
Toggle label and description correct ('When disabled, prices will be hidden and customers will need to request quotes')
Product cards show 'Request Quote' instead of prices when show_prices=false
Product cards show 'Add to Inquiry' button instead of 'Add to Cart' when show_prices=false
Product detail page shows 'Request Quote for Pricing' when show_prices=false
Product detail page shows 'Add to Inquiry' and 'Get Quote' buttons when show_prices=false
Cart page becomes 'Inquiry List' when show_prices=false
Cart shows 'Prices are available upon request' message
Cart shows 'Request Quotation' button instead of 'Proceed to Checkout'
Products page shows prices with AED values when show_prices=true
Discount badges (% OFF) visible when show_prices=true
Add to Cart button visible when show_prices=true

critical_code_review_comments: Price toggle feature implemented correctly across frontend and backend
Settings API correctly exposes show_prices in public settings for frontend consumption
AppContext correctly fetches and propagates show_prices to all components
ProductCard, ProductDetailPage, CartPage, and CheckoutPage all correctly handle quotation mode
Minor: CheckoutPage has navigate() call outside useEffect - should be refactored for React best practices
context_for_next_testing_agent: Price Hide/Show Toggle feature fully implemented and tested. Backend API: PUT /api/erp/settings with {show_prices: boolean} controls the setting. Public API GET /api/settings returns show_prices for frontend. When show_prices=false: ProductCard shows 'Request Quote' and 'Add to Inquiry', ProductDetailPage shows 'Request Quote for Pricing' with 'Add to Inquiry'/'Get Quote' buttons, CartPage becomes 'Inquiry List' with 'Request Quotation' button. When show_prices=true: All prices visible with AED values, discount badges, and normal cart/checkout flow. Login text label next to login icon verified working.

features_verified.price_toggle_in_erp_settings: PASS - Storefront tab with 'Show Prices on Website' toggle
features_verified.show_prices_false_product_cards: PASS - Shows 'Request Quote' and 'Add to Inquiry'
features_verified.show_prices_false_cart_page: PASS - Becomes 'Inquiry List' with no prices
features_verified.login_text_next_to_icon: PASS - 'Login' text visible when not logged in

mocked_integrations.email_sending: MOCKED - SendGrid API key not configured, cart enquiry emails may not be delivered
